title: execute input
description: Input schema for the execute tool.

action.description: The action to execute. 'replay' and 'replay_raw' are accepted as deprecated aliases.

session_id.description: Session ID for resend, resend_raw, or single-session deletion.

intercept_id.description: Intercept ID for release, modify_and_forward, or drop actions.

override_url.description: URL override for resend. Must include scheme and host.

override_headers.description: Header overrides for resend as key-value pairs (replaces matching headers).

add_headers.description: Headers to add (appended to existing values for same key).

body_patches.description: Partial body modification rules. Each item uses either json_path+value or regex+replace.

regex.description: Regular expression pattern for text-based patch.

replace.description: Replacement string for regex patch. Supports capture groups ($1, $2, etc.).

override_host.description: TCP connection target as host:port (independent of URL host). Subject to SSRF protection.

dry_run.description: Preview modified request without sending (default: false).

tag.description: Tag to attach to the result session.

older_than_days.description: Delete sessions older than this many days. Must be >= 1.

confirm.description: Confirm bulk deletion (required for older_than_days or delete-all).
